uiux.title: HerAid — Women's Safety & Health App
uiux.desc: HerAid is a women's safety and menstruation-tracking platform designed to connect users with safety NGOs, track personal wellness metrics, and ensure privacy-first health management.

modules.name: Splash Screen
modules.desc: Branded landing page focusing on minimal layout and clean structure.

modules.name: Get Started Onboarding
modules.desc: Clean onboarding sequence illustrating primary functions.

modules.name: NGO Directory & Contact
modules.desc: A direct bridge to contact local safety organizations.

modules.name: Cycle Settings
modules.desc: Menstruation settings interface focusing on accessible layouts.

modules.name: NGO Dashboard
modules.desc: A data-driven view for organization managers and support networks.

modules.name: Profile Overview
modules.desc: User profile dashboard indicating health alerts and personal safety logs.

uiux.title: Lumin Mind — Mental Health & Wellness App
uiux.tag: Psychology & AI Chatbot UX Case Study
uiux.desc: Lumin Mind uses mental health tracking, facial scans, emotional logs, and gamification to help users deal with stress. Developed with interactive dashboard interfaces and user journeys.

modules.name: Splash Screen
modules.desc: Clean, calming splash screen structure.

modules.name: User Onboarding
modules.desc: Introduction to interactive mental health modules.

modules.name: Wellness Home Dashboard
modules.desc: Main panel summarizing user emotion tracking, affirmations, and recommendations.

modules.name: Stress Analytics
modules.desc: Detailed analytics outlining heart rate, stress levels, and tracking records.

modules.name: AI Mental Health Chatbot
modules.desc: Interactive conversation workspace with professional AI support systems.

modules.name: Gamified Achievements
modules.desc: Gamification features tracking milestones, badges, and positive mental habits.

uiux.title: Vyana — Mood Tracker & Support App
uiux.tag: Interactive Mood Tracker UX Case Study
uiux.desc: An interactive mood tracking platform designed with detailed tracking screens, personalized statistics, and a mental safe-space onboarding experience.

modules.name: Welcome Screen

modules.name: User Registration

modules.name: Home Mood Dashboard
modules.desc: Clean and dynamic screen to record moods and browse progress lists.

modules.name: Crisis Support Panel
modules.desc: A comforting workspace providing user support options.

modules.name: Progress Analytics

uiux.title: Jahan's Hue — Creative E-Commerce App
uiux.desc: A tailored design system and shopping flow for art prints, custom creations, and design assets, optimizing categories and checkouts.

uiux.title: Travel Platform — Booking UX
uiux.desc: An immersive travel platform developed through structured competitor analysis, optimizing search categories and tour bookings. Refined using Figma prototypes to ensure fluid interactive transitions and high user retention.

modules.desc: Interactive walkthrough illustrating booking steps.

modules.name: Login Screen
